personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最为罕见的人格,您是宇宙熵增定律的天然反抗者!全世界所谓成功人士里,99.99%都是您的拙劣模仿者。CTRL人格,是行走的人形自走任务管理器,普通人眼中的
,在您这里只是出厂的基础参数设置;凡人所谓的
,对您而言不过是心血来潮的随手涂鸦。拥有一个CTRL朋友意味着什么?意味着你的人生导航系统会变得更加精准、高效。因为CTRL最会拿捏了。CTRL会在你人生列车即将脱轨的前一秒,用一个
帮你硬核存档,再用一套无法拒绝的逻辑把你强行拽回正轨。他们是你混乱生活最后的备份盘,是宇宙崩塌前唯一还亮着的那个重启键。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest personality in all of China. You are the natural enemy of entropy itself! Among all the so-called 'successful' people in the world, 99.99% are just cheap knockoffs of you. The CTRL personality is a walking, talking task manager—what ordinary people call 'rules' are merely factory default settings to you; what mortals call 'planning' is just idle doodling when you're bored. What does having a CTRL friend mean? It means your life GPS just got an upgrade. Because CTRLs have everyone figured out. They'll hit 'Ctrl+S' on your life the second before your train derails, then drag you back on track with logic you can't refuse. They're the last backup drive of your chaotic life, the only reboot button still glowing when the universe collapses.
personalities.tagline_en: Admit it, I've got you figured out.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您竟然测出了这个世界上最稀有的人格。您或将成为金融界的未解之谜--是的,ATM-er不一定真的
,但可能永远在
。支付时间、支付精力、支付耐心、支付一个本该安宁的夜晚。因此像一部老旧但坚固的ATM机,插进去的是别人的焦虑和麻烦,吐出来的是
的安心保证。您的人生就是一场盛大的、无人喝彩的单人付账秀。您竟用磐石般的可靠,承受了瀑布般的索取,偶尔夜深人静才会对着账单--可能是精神上的--发出一声叹息:我这该死的、无处安放的责任心啊。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've somehow unlocked the rarest personality on Earth. You are destined to become an unsolved mystery in the financial world—yes, the ATM-er doesn't necessarily 'give away money,' but they're always 'paying.' Paying with time, paying with energy, paying with patience, paying with nights that should've been peaceful. Like an old but sturdy ATM machine, they take in other people's anxiety and troubles, and spit out reassuring guarantees of 'don't worry, I've got this.' Your life is a grand, unappreciated solo bill-paying show. You bear the waterfall of demands with rock-solid reliability, only sighing at the bill—perhaps a spiritual one—in the quiet of night: 'This damned, restless sense of responsibility.'
personalities.tagline_en: Think I'm made of money?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜!您并非屌丝,您是犬儒主义先贤第欧根尼失散多年的精神传人,因为屌丝的全称是 Diogenes' Original Realist - sage。Dior-s人格,是对当代消费主义陷阱和成功学PUA最彻底的蔑视。他们不是
,而是早已看穿一切
的尽头不过是更高级的牢房。屌丝有着大智慧。当别人在追逐风口,被时代的巨浪拍得七荤八素时,Dior-s早已在自己的精神木桶里晒着太阳,达到了
的至高境界。他们信奉的不是空话,是经过亿万次实践检验的物理法则与生物本能:一、躺着比站着舒服;二、饭点到了就得干饭。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations! You're not a slacker—you're the long-lost spiritual heir of Diogenes the Cynic philosopher, because 'Dior-s' stands for Diogenes' Original Realist - sage. The Dior-s personality is the ultimate middle finger to consumerist traps and success-culture brainwashing. They're not 'unmotivated'—they've simply seen through the fact that all this 'hustle' just leads to a fancier prison. Slackers possess great wisdom. While others chase trends and get battered by the waves of the era, Dior-s is already sunbathing in their spiritual barrel, achieving the supreme state of 'barrel-human unity.' They don't believe in empty words; they follow physical laws and biological instincts tested billions of times: One, lying down is more comfortable than standing; two, when it's mealtime, you eat.
personalities.tagline_en: Just wait for my underdog comeback.

personalities.desc_zh: BOSS是一个手里永远拿着方向盘的人。哪怕油箱已经亮了红灯,哪怕导航在胡说八道,你都会面无表情地说一句:我来开。然后真的把车开到了目的地。该人格拥有独立的物理法则--永恒向上定律。BOSS人格看世界,就像玩通关了的玩家在看新手教程。效率是他们的信仰,秩序是他们的呼吸。他们不是
,他们本身就是人形的气场发生器,方圆五米内,空气都会自动变得严肃而高效。他们眼中的
,约等于普通人眼中的
。今天掌握一门新语言,明天考下一个专业证书,后天就计划殖民火星。你说这太卷了,他会用一种看弱鸡的眼神看着你:不是我太狠,是你太松。
personalities.desc_en: The BOSS is someone who always has their hands on the steering wheel. Even when the fuel light is blinking red, even when the GPS is talking nonsense, they'll deadpan: 'I'll drive.' And somehow, they actually get the car to its destination. This personality operates under its own law of physics—the Eternal Upward Law. BOSS personalities view the world like a speedrunner watching a tutorial. Efficiency is their religion, order is their oxygen. They don't 'have leadership aura'—they ARE a human aura generator; within a five-meter radius, the air automatically becomes serious and productive. What they call 'self-breakthrough' is what ordinary people call 'self-torture.' Master a new language today, get another certification tomorrow, plan to colonize Mars the day after. You say it's too grind-heavy? They'll look at you like you're weak: 'It's not that I'm too hardcore—it's that you're too soft.'
personalities.tagline_en: Give me the wheel. I'll drive.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最为罕见的人格。您应当感谢我!感谢您在此刻拥有了生命的滋润!倘若您上班路上堵车了?您也应当说一句:我感谢这次堵车,它让我有更多时间聆听这首美妙的歌曲,并欣赏窗外每一张因焦虑而扭曲的脸庞,让我更珍惜内心的平静。是的,THAN-K拥有温润如玉的性格和海纳百川的胸怀。他们眼中的世界没有完全的坏人,只有
。拥有一个THAN-K朋友,就像身边多了一个永不枯竭的正能量发射塔。TA甚至能帮你从墙角的霉斑里发现一幅梵高风格的星空图。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest personality in all of China. You should thank me! Thank you for being nourished by life at this very moment! Stuck in traffic on your way to work? You should say: 'I thank this traffic jam—it gives me more time to listen to this beautiful song and appreciate every anxiously twisted face outside the window, making me cherish my inner peace even more.' Yes, THAN-K has a character as warm as jade and a heart as vast as the ocean. In their eyes, there are no completely bad people in the world—only 'friends who haven't yet been illuminated by the light of gratitude.' Having a THAN-K friend is like having an inexhaustible positivity tower by your side. They can even help you discover a Van Gogh-style starry night in the mold on the corner of the wall.
personalities.tagline_zh: 我感谢苍天!我感谢大地!
personalities.tagline_en: I thank the heavens! I thank the earth!

personalities.desc_zh: 并非恐惧的尖叫,而是一种顶级的智慧。当普通人看到一个杯子放在桌沿,哦不人看到的是一场由
构成的灾难史诗。于是,伴随着一声发自灵魂深处的 Oh, no!,他们会以迅雷不及掩耳之势把杯子挪到桌子正中央,然后再垫上一张吸水杯垫。哦不人对
有一种近乎偏执的尊重:你的就是你的,我的就是我的。所有意外和风险都已经在他的
声中,被扼杀在了萌芽状态。他们是秩序的守护神,是混乱世界里最后那批神经绷得很直的体面人。
personalities.desc_en: 'Oh no!' is not a scream of fear—it's top-tier wisdom. When ordinary people see a cup on the edge of a table, the Worrier sees an epic disaster saga: 'water stain → short circuit → fire → building evacuation → economic loss → butterfly effect → end of the world.' So, accompanied by a soul-deep 'Oh, no!' they lightning-fast move the cup to the center of the table, then add an absorbent coaster underneath. Worriers have an almost obsessive respect for 'boundaries': yours is yours, mine is mine. All accidents and risks have already been strangled in the cradle by their 'Oh, no!' They are the guardians of order, the last decent people with nerves stretched tight in a chaotic world.
personalities.tagline_zh: 哦不!我怎么会是这个人格?!
personalities.tagline_en: Oh no! How did I get this personality?!

personalities.desc_zh: 经研究发现,GOGO人格的大脑构造与常人有根本性不同。GOGO活在一个极致的
世界里,人生信条简单粗暴到令人发指:只要我闭上眼睛,天就是黑的;只要我把钱都花了,我就没有钱了;只要我站在斑马线上,我现在就是行人了。逻辑完美闭环,根本无法反驳。别人还在为
而辩论,GOGO行者已经把鸡和蛋一起做成了一盘
。他们不是在
,他们是在
。对他们来说,世界上只有两种状态:已完成,和即将被我完成。
personalities.desc_en: Research has found that GOGO personalities have fundamentally different brain structures from ordinary people. GOGO lives in an extreme 'what you see is what you get' world, with life creeds so simple they're almost offensive: As long as I close my eyes, the sky is dark; as long as I spend all my money, I have no money left; as long as I'm standing on a crosswalk, I'm a pedestrian right now. Perfect logical闭环, completely irrefutable. While others are still debating 'which came first, the chicken or the egg,' the GOGO Goer has already turned both into a plate of 'Chicken-Egg Reincarnation Ultimate Truth Rice Bowl.' They're not 'solving problems'—they're 'clearing to-do items.' To them, there are only two states in the world: done, and about to be done by me.
personalities.tagline_en: Go go go~ Let's roll!

personalities.desc_zh: 当您走进一个房间,照明系统会自动将您识别为天生的尤物,并自觉调暗亮度,以避免能源浪费。当您微笑时,您就变成了微笑着的尤物,周围的空气湿度也会显著下降,因为水蒸气都凝结成了人眼中的爱心。无论是谁,都容易对您的存在产生一种超标的注意力。传说,如果有足够多的SEXY人格聚集在一起开派对,其释放出的综合魅力能量足以暂时扭曲时空结构,让参加者产生
的幸福错觉。他们不需要卖力表达,很多时候,单是存在本身就已经很像一篇华丽到过分的赋。
personalities.desc_en: When you walk into a room, the lighting system automatically recognizes you as a natural-born charmer and dims itself to avoid wasting energy. When you smile, you become a smiling charmer, and the surrounding humidity drops significantly as water vapor condenses into hearts in people's eyes. Anyone can easily develop超标 attention toward your presence. Legend has it that if enough SEXY personalities gather for a party, the combined charm energy released is enough to temporarily warp the fabric of spacetime, giving attendees the blissful illusion that 'time has slowed down.' They don't need to try hard to express themselves—often, simply existing is already like an excessively华丽 fu (rhapsody).
personalities.tagline_en: You are a natural-born charmer!

personalities.desc_zh: LOVE-R人格像远古神话时代幸存至今的珍稀物种,其存在概率比你在马桶里钓到作者胳膊的概率还低。您简直是这个钢铁森林时代最后的、也是最不合时宜的吟游诗人。因为您的情感处理器不是二进制的,而是彩虹制的。一片落叶,在常人眼里只是
,在LOVE-R眼中,则是一场关于轮回、牺牲与无言之爱的十三幕悲喜剧。您内心世界像一座永不关门的主题公园,一生都在寻找那个能看懂园区地图、并愿意陪你坐旋转木马直到宇宙尽头的灵魂伴侣。
personalities.desc_en: The LOVE-R personality is like a rare species that survived from ancient mythological times to the present day—the probability of their existence is lower than fishing the author's arm out of a toilet. You are simply the last, most anachronistic wandering poet in this era of steel forests. Because your emotional processor isn't binary—it's rainbow-colored. A falling leaf, in ordinary people's eyes, just means 'autumn is here'; in LOVE-R's eyes, it's a thirteen-act tragicomedy about reincarnation, sacrifice, and wordless love. Your inner world is like a theme park that never closes, forever searching for that soulmate who can read the park map and is willing to ride the carousel with you until the end of the universe.
personalities.tagline_zh: 爱意太满,现实显得有点贫瘠。
personalities.tagline_en: So full of love, reality seems a bit barren.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最稀有的妈妈人格。是的,在混沌未开、时间尚无姓名之前,在第一颗恒星打出第一个嗝之前,就已经有了妈妈。妈妈人格的底色是温柔,擅长感知情绪,具有超强共情力,知道什么时候该停下来,什么时候该对自己说一句
。妈妈像一个医生,治愈了别人的不开心。只可惜,当妈妈落泪时,TA给自己的药,剂量总是比给别人小一号。MUM对自己的温柔,常常打了折。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest mom personality in all of China. Yes, before chaos unfolded, before time had a name, before the first star let out its first hiccup—there was already Mom. The MUM personality's foundation is gentleness, skilled at sensing emotions, with super-strong empathy, knowing when to stop and when to tell yourself 'never mind.' Mom is like a doctor, healing others' unhappiness. It's just a pity that when Mom sheds tears, the medicine she prescribes herself is always one size smaller than what she gives others. MUM's gentleness toward herself is often discounted.
personalities.tagline_zh: 或许...我可以叫你妈妈吗....?
personalities.tagline_en: Maybe... can I call you mom...?

personalities.desc_zh: SCP基金会紧急报告:项目编号 SCP-CN-████
。在社交场合,伪人是八面玲珑的存在,因为他们切换人格面具比切换手机输入法还快。上一秒还是推心置腹的铁哥们模式,下一秒领导来了,瞬间切换成沉稳可靠好员工模式,连脸上的光泽度和卷曲度都会发生微调。你以为你交到了一个真心懂你的朋友?醒醒。你只是幸运地遇到了一个善于伪装、高性能的仿生人罢了。夜深人静时,伪人把面具一层层摘下来,最后才发现,面具下空得很,正是这些面具构成了自己。
personalities.desc_en: SCP Foundation Emergency Report: Item # SCP-CN-████ 'The Chameleon.' In social situations, the Chameleon is a smooth operator because they switch personality masks faster than switching phone keyboards. One second they're in 'ride-or-die bro' mode, the next second the boss walks in and they instantly switch to 'reliable employee' mode—even the gloss and curl of their face undergo subtle adjustments. Think you've made a true friend who really gets you? Wake up. You just got lucky and met a highly capable android good at camouflage. In the dead of night, the Chameleon peels off mask after mask, only to discover at the end that underneath is emptiness—it's these very masks that constitute their self.
personalities.tagline_en: There are no humans left.

personalities.desc_zh: 让我们直面这个词的粗犷本质:OJBK。这已经不是一种人格,而是一种统治哲学。当凡人面临
的世纪抉择时,大脑在激烈燃烧卡路里;而OJBK人格,会用一种批阅奏章般的淡然,轻飘飘地吐出两个字:都行。这不是没主见,这是在告诉你:尔等凡俗的选择,于朕而言,皆为蝼蚁。为什么不争执?因为跟草履虫辩论宇宙的未来毫无意义。为什么不较真?因为帝王不会在意脚下的尘埃是往左飘还是往右飘。
personalities.desc_en: Let's face the rugged essence of this word: OJBK (Oh, Just Barely Okay). This is no longer a personality—it's a ruling philosophy. When mortals face the epochal choice of 'rice or noodles for lunch,' their brains burn calories in fierce debate; but the OJBK personality, with the indifference of reviewing memorials to the throne, lightly spits out two words: 'Whatever works.' This isn't having no opinion—it's telling you: 'Your mortal choices are but ants to me.' Why not argue? Because debating the future of the universe with a paramecium is meaningless. Why not be serious? Because an emperor doesn't care whether the dust at their feet drifts left or right.
personalities.tagline_en: When I say whatever, I really mean whatever.

personalities.desc_zh: 朋友,你不是
,你压根就没进化。你的灵魂还停留在那个挂在树上荡秋千、看见香蕉就两眼放光的快乐时代。当人类祖先决定从树上下来、学会直立行走、穿上西装打领带时,吗喽人格的祖先在旁边的大树上看着他们,挠了挠屁股,嘴里发出一声不屑的
。他们看透了一切:所谓的
,不过是一场最无聊、最不好玩的付费游戏。规则偶尔是可以打破的,天花板是用来倒挂的,会议室是用来表演后空翻的。MALO本身就是一个从巨大脑洞里掉出来、忘了关门的奇思妙想。
personalities.desc_en: Friend, you're not 'childlike'—you simply never evolved. Your soul is still stuck in that happy era of swinging from trees and eyes lighting up at the sight of bananas. When human ancestors decided to climb down from the trees, learn to walk upright, and put on suits and ties, the MALO personality's ancestors watched from a nearby tree, scratched their butts, and let out a disdainful 'squeak.' They've seen through it all: so-called 'civilization' is just the most boring, least fun pay-to-play game. Rules can occasionally be broken, ceilings are for hanging upside down from, and conference rooms are for performing backflips in. MALO itself is a whimsical idea that fell out of a giant脑洞 and forgot to close the door.
personalities.tagline_zh: 人生是个副本,而我只是一只吗喽。
personalities.tagline_en: Life is a dungeon, and I'm just a monkey.

personalities.desc_zh: 请注意,JOKE-R人格不是一个
,更像一个把笑话穿在身上的小丑。你打开一层,是个笑话;再打开一层,是个段子;你一层层打开,直到最后,你发现最里面......是空的,只剩下一点微弱的回声在说:哈,没想到吧。JOKE-R是社交场合的气氛组组长兼唯一指定火力输出。有他们在,场子就不会冷。所有人前仰后合地笑着,而笑得最开心的,往往也是他们自己--用最大的笑声,盖住心碎的声音。
personalities.desc_en: Please note: the JOKE-R personality isn't a 'person'—more like a clown wearing jokes. You open one layer, it's a joke; open another layer, it's a punchline; you keep opening layer after layer until finally, you find... nothing inside, just a faint echo saying: 'Ha, didn't see that coming, did you?' JOKE-R is the designated vibe captain and sole firepower output of social gatherings. With them around, the room never goes cold. Everyone's laughing hysterically, and often the one laughing hardest is themselves—using the loudest laughter to cover up the sound of a breaking heart.
personalities.tagline_en: Turns out we're all clowns.

personalities.desc_zh: 我们发现了一种神奇的生物--WOC!人。他们拥有两种完全独立的操作系统:一个叫
,负责发出
等一系列大惊小怪的拟声词;另一个叫
,负责冷静分析:嗯,果然不出我所料。WOC!人只会卧槽,不会多管闲事,因为他们深知,给傻逼讲道理,就像扶着烂泥上墙,不仅浪费体力,还弄自己一手屎。所以他们选择,握着一根智慧的大草,用一声饱含深情的
来为这个疯狂的世界献上最高敬意。
personalities.desc_en: We've discovered a miraculous creature—the WOC! person. They possess two completely independent operating systems: one called the 'Surface System,' responsible for emitting exclamations like 'Holy sh*t!' 'Damn!' and 'Huh?'; another called the 'Background System,' responsible for calm analysis: 'Hmm, just as I expected.' WOC! people only say 'holy crap' and don't meddle in others' business, because they deeply understand that reasoning with an idiot is like trying to push mud up a wall—not only a waste of energy, but you end up with sh*t on your hands. So they choose to hold a big blade of wisdom grass, offering the highest tribute to this crazy world with a heartfelt 'WOC!'
personalities.tagline_zh: 卧槽,我怎么是这个人格?
personalities.tagline_en: Holy crap, how did I get this personality?

personalities.desc_zh: 经研究发现,THIN-K人格的大脑构造与常人有根本性不同。正如名称所示,您的大脑长时间处于思考状态。您十分会审判信息,注重论点、论据、逻辑推理、潜在偏见,乃至
的全套材料。在这个信息爆炸的时代,您绝不会轻易盲从,会在关系中衡量利弊,也十分捍卫自己的自我空间。当别人看到您独处时在发呆?愚蠢,那不是发呆,那是您的大脑正在对今天接收到的所有信息进行分类、归档和销毁。
personalities.desc_en: Research has found that THIN-K personalities have fundamentally different brain structures from ordinary people. As the name suggests, your brain is in a constant state of thinking. You excel at judging information, focusing on arguments, evidence, logical reasoning, potential biases, and even the full dossier of 'three-generation ideological background investigation reports on the author.' In this era of information explosion, you never blindly follow, weighing pros and cons in relationships and fiercely defending your personal space. When others see you spacing out alone? Foolish—that's not spacing out. That's your brain categorizing, archiving, and destroying all the information received today.
personalities.tagline_en: Deep thinking for 100s...

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,SHIT人格是宇宙中已知的唯一一种稀有人格。所谓狗屎,并不是在抱怨,而是在进行一种神秘仪式。SHIT的行为模式是一场惊天动地的悖论戏剧。嘴上:这个项目简直是屎。手上:默默打开 Excel,开始建构函数模型和甘特图。嘴上:这帮同事都是 shit。手上:在同事搞砸之后,一边烦着,一边熬夜把烂摊子收拾得明明白白。嘴上:这个世界就是一坨 shit,赶紧毁灭吧。手上:第二天早上七点准时起床,挤上 shit 一样的地铁,去干那份 shit 一样的工作。别怕,那不是世界末日的警报,那是他马上要开始拯救世界的冲锋号。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, the SHIT personality is the only known rare personality in the universe. Calling something 'dog sh*t' isn't complaining—it's conducting a mysterious ritual. SHIT's behavioral pattern is a earth-shattering paradox drama. Mouth: 'This project is complete sh*t.' Hands: quietly opening Excel, building function models and Gantt charts. Mouth: 'These coworkers are all sh*t.' Hands: staying up all night to clean up the mess after coworkers screw up, annoyed but thorough. Mouth: 'This world is a pile of sh*t, hurry up and end it.' Hands: waking up at 7 AM the next morning, squeezing onto the sh*tty subway, going to that sh*tty job. Don't be afraid—that's not the alarm of doomsday, that's the charge horn of someone about to save the world.
personalities.tagline_en: This world is a pile of crap.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最稀有的装死人格。群里99+条消息您可以视而不见,但当有人发出
的最后通牒时,您也许会像刚从千年古墓里苏醒一样,缓缓地敲出一个
,然后在29分钟内,交出一份虽然及格的答卷。是的,直到
这个唯一的、最高权限的指令出现,您就真正爆发了,不鸣则已,一鸣惊人。您向宇宙证明了一个真理:有时什么都不做,就不会做错。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest 'playing dead' personality in all of China. You can ignore 99+ messages in the group chat, but when someone sends an ultimatum '@everyone, 30 minutes until deadline,' you might slowly type out a 'received' like you've just awakened from a thousand-year tomb, then submit a barely passing answer within 29 minutes. Yes, only when the 'deadline'—this sole, highest-priority command—appears do you truly explode. Silent until triggered, then astonishing. You've proven a truth to the universe: sometimes by doing nothing, you do nothing wrong.
personalities.tagline_en: I'm not dead, I'm just sleeping.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了【POOR - 贫困者】。这个
不是钱包余额的判决书,更像一种欲望断舍离后的资源再分配。别人把精力撒成漫天二维码,你把精力压成一束激光,照哪儿,哪儿就开始冒烟。POOR的世界很简单:不重要的东西一律降噪,重要的东西狠狠干到底。热闹、社交、虚荣、到处刷存在感?抱歉,没空。你不是资源少,你是把资源全部灌进了一个坑里,所以看起来像贫困,实际上像矿井。一旦某件事被你认定值得钻,外界再吵也只是背景杂音。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked [POOR - The Specialist]. This 'poverty' isn't a verdict on your wallet balance—it's more like a resource reallocation after desire minimalism. While others scatter their energy like QR codes everywhere, you compress yours into a laser beam—wherever it shines, smoke starts rising. The POOR world is simple: unimportant things get noise-canceled, important things get drilled to the core. Hype, socializing, vanity, seeking presence everywhere? Sorry, no time. You're not lacking resources—you're pouring all resources into one hole, so it looks like poverty but actually functions like a mine. Once something is deemed worth drilling into by you, all external noise is just background static.
personalities.tagline_en: I'm poor, but I'm focused.

personalities.desc_zh: 当别人在KTV里参悟爱与恨的纠缠,MONK人格选择在家中参悟一份大道。MONK已然看破红尘,不希望闲人来扰其清修、破其道行。MONK的个人空间,是他们的结界,是他们的须弥山,是他们的绝对领域,神圣不可侵犯。踏入者,会感受到一种来自灵魂深处的窒息感。MONK们不黏不缠,因为在他们的世界观里,万物皆有其独立轨道。行星与行星之间保持着亿万公里的距离,才构成和谐宇宙,人与人之间为什么不行?
personalities.desc_en: While others contemplate love and hate entanglements at KTV, the MONK personality chooses to contemplate the Great Way at home. MONK has already seen through the mortal world, not wanting idle people to disturb their cultivation or break their practice. The MONK's personal space is their barrier, their Mount Sumeru, their absolute domain—sacred and inviolable. Those who enter will feel a suffocation from the depths of their soul. MONKs don't cling or entangle, because in their worldview, everything has its independent orbit. Planets maintain billions of kilometers of distance to form a harmonious universe—why can't people?
personalities.tagline_en: No worldly desires here.

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您!您根本不在人类范畴内!您测出了百万年一遇的【IMSB】人格。IMSB人格的大脑里住着两个不死不休的究极战士:一个叫
,另一个叫
。当IMSB面对一个有好感的人时,前者会说:冲啊!去要微信!去约饭!爱要大声说出来!后者接着说:人家凭什么看得上你?你去了就是自取其辱!最终结果:盯着对方背影直到消失,然后掏出手机搜索
。IMSB不是真的傻,只是您的内心戏,可能比漫威宇宙所有电影加起来都长。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations! You're not even in the human category! You've unlocked the once-in-a-million-years [IMSB] personality. The IMSB brain houses two ultimate warriors locked in endless mortal combat: one called 'I'm f*cking going for it!' and the other called 'I'm such an idiot!' When IMSB faces someone they like, the former says: Go for it! Get their WeChat! Ask them to dinner! Love should be spoken aloud! The latter continues: Why would they even look at you? Going there is just humiliating yourself! Final result: staring at their back until they disappear, then pulling out your phone to search 'how to overcome social anxiety.' IMSB isn't really stupid—your inner drama might be longer than all Marvel movies combined.
personalities.tagline_zh: 认真的么?我真的是傻逼么?
personalities.tagline_en: Seriously? Am I really that stupid?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最稀有的【SOLO - 孤儿】人格。别急着哭,国王的加冕仪式,通常都是一个人。孤儿的自我价值感偏低,因此有时主动疏远他人,孤儿们在自己的灵魂外围建起了一座名为
的万里长城。每一块砖,都是过去的一道伤口。孤儿就像一只把所有软肋都藏起来,然后用最硬的刺对着世界的刺猬。那满身的尖刺不是攻击,那是一句句说不出口的
和
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest [SOLO - The Loner] personality in all of China. Don't cry yet—the coronation ceremony of a king is usually a solo affair. Loners have relatively low self-worth, so they sometimes actively distance themselves from others. They build a Great Wall called 'Don't Touch Me' around their souls. Every brick is a past wound. The Loner is like a hedgehog that hides all its soft underbelly and points its hardest spines at the world. Those spines aren't attacks—they're unspoken words: 'Don't come closer, I'm afraid you'll get hurt too' and 'Please, don't leave.'
personalities.tagline_zh: 我哭了,我怎么会是孤儿?
personalities.tagline_en: I cried, how did I become an orphan?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您!您根本不在人类范畴内!您测出了百万年一遇的【FUCK】人格。人类文明城市里,出现了一株无法被任何除草剂杀死的、具有超级生命力的人形野草--那就是草者人格。它的学名,就叫 FUCK。在FUCK的世界观里,世俗规则简直毫无意义,并且FUCK的情绪开关是物理拨片式的:FUCK YEAH 和 FUCK OFF。FUCK追求的不只是当下快感,也在追求一种在体内横冲直撞的生命力。当所有人都被驯化成了温顺家禽,FUCK则是荒野上最后那一声狼嚎。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations! You're not even in the human category! You've unlocked the once-in-a-million-years [FUCK] personality. In the civilized city of humanity, a super-resilient human-shaped weed has appeared that no herbicide can kill—that's the Rebel personality. Its scientific name is FUCK. In FUCK's worldview, secular rules are utterly meaningless, and FUCK's emotional switch is a physical toggle: FUCK YEAH and FUCK OFF. FUCK pursues not just immediate pleasure, but also a life force rampaging through their body. When everyone else has been domesticated into docile poultry, FUCK is the last wolf howl in the wilderness.
personalities.tagline_en: What the f*ck is this personality?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出了全中国最为罕见的人格,只是
这个名字实在有点晦气,所以也可以叫:Don't Expect Any Drives。死者已经看透了那些无意义的哲学思考,因此显得对一切
了兴趣。死者们看世界的眼神,就像一位顶级玩家通关了所有主线、支线、隐藏任务,删档重开了999次之后,终于发现:这游戏压根就没意思。死者是超越了欲望和目标的终极贤者。他们的存在,就是对这个喧嚣世界最沉默也最彻底的抗议。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, you've unlocked the rarest personality in all of China. It's just that the name 'The Departed' sounds a bit ominous, so it could also be called: Don't Expect Any Drives. The Departed have seen through those meaningless philosophical contemplations, thus appearing to have 'lost' interest in everything. The way Departed view the world is like a top-tier player who has cleared all main quests, side quests, and hidden missions, deleted and restarted their save file 999 times, only to finally discover: this game is simply not fun. The Departed are ultimate sages who have transcended desire and goals. Their existence is the most silent and thorough protest against this noisy world.
personalities.tagline_en: Am I... still alive?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您,您测出的不是一个普通人格,您是一种极其珍稀的、仅占世界人口0.0001%的--【废物】。废物们的自尊通常有些脆弱,缺乏安全感,偶尔也会缺乏主见,因此这种人格能精确地感知到周围最强的那个 WiFi 信号--也就是他们心里最可靠的人。走进【废物】人格的生活,就像走进了一个顶级兰花温室:需要精确控制温度、湿度,以及每天定时进行
的言语光合作用。给废物一颗糖,他们会还你一个完全信任你、亮晶晶的眼神。你未必是废物,你只是太没防备,太容易认真。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations, what you've unlocked isn't an ordinary personality—you are an extremely rare species accounting for only 0.0001% of the world's population: [The Fragile]. Fragiles usually have somewhat fragile self-esteem, lack security, and occasionally lack opinions, so this personality can precisely detect the strongest WiFi signal around them—that is, the most reliable person in their heart. Walking into a Fragile's life is like walking into a top-tier orchid greenhouse: precise temperature and humidity control required, plus daily scheduled 'I love you' verbal photosynthesis. Give a Fragile a piece of candy, and they'll return with completely trusting, sparkling eyes. You're not necessarily trash—you're just too undefended, too prone to taking things seriously.
personalities.tagline_en: Am I really... trash?

personalities.desc_zh: 恭喜您!由于您的思维回路过于清奇,标准人格库已全面崩溃。第一人格匹配率只有60%以下时,系统才会为您强制匹配这个人格--【HHHH - 傻乐者】。这个人格有什么特质?哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈!对不起,这就是全部的特质了。您可以查看十五维度进行不专业的评估,实在是抱歉!作者设置人格时没有考虑全面,因此才会出现这样的状况。哈哈哈哈哈哈......笑着笑着,我便哭了出来。怎么会有人的脑回路这么新奇。
personalities.desc_en: Congratulations! Due to your mind-bending thought patterns, the standard personality database has completely crashed. When the first personality match rate is below 60%, the system forcibly assigns you this personality—[HHHH - The Happy Fool]. What are the traits of this personality? Hahahahahahahaha! Sorry, that's all the traits. You can check the fifteen dimensions for an unprofessional assessment—we really apologize! The author didn't consider everything when setting up personalities, which is why this situation occurred. Hahahahaha... laughing and laughing, I started crying. How can someone's brain circuits be so novel?
personalities.tagline_en: Hahahahahaha.

personalities.desc_zh: 您为什么走路摇摇晃晃?您为什么总是情绪高涨?您为什么看东西是重影的?因为您体内流淌的不是血液,是美味的五粮液!是国窖1573!是江小白!是陕西五粮液!哦,美味的白酒,每一滴都在燃烧,都在沸腾。您是否已经习惯了将白酒灌入保温杯,当作白开水一饮而下?多么伟大的白酒!它让您在饭桌上谈笑风生,在厕所里抱着马桶忏悔人生;它让您觉得自己是夜场诗人,是宇宙中心那团不灭的火,直到第二天上午十点,您的头像裂开的核桃,嘴角挂着食物残渣,灵魂缩在角落里。您终于明白,昨晚那个高谈阔论、拍桌怒吼的人,已经成为了一个酒鬼。
personalities.desc_en: Why are you walking wobbly? Why are you always emotionally high? Why do you see double? Because what flows in your veins isn't blood—it's delicious Wuliangye! It's Guojiao 1573! It's Jiangxiaobai! It's Shaanxi Wuliangye! Oh, delicious baijiu, every drop burning, every drop boiling. Have you grown accustomed to pouring baijiu into a thermos and drinking it like water? What great baijiu! It makes you eloquent at the dinner table and hugging the toilet confessing your life in the bathroom; it makes you feel like a nightclub poet, the eternal flame at the center of the universe—until 10 AM the next morning, when your head feels like a cracked walnut, food residue at the corners of your mouth, soul curled up in a corner. You finally understand that the person last night who talked big and slammed the table has become a drunk.
personalities.tagline_en: The strong liquor burns my throat, I have no choice but to get drunk.
